probes.prompt: Exactly two students answered every question.
The teacher gave every student a grade.
John saw himself in the mirror.
Every boy thinks he is smart.
No student who failed the exam thinks he deserved to pass.
She persuaded him to believe that she was right.
The cat that chased the dog is black.
The cat that the dog chased is black.
Every student who read a book passed the exam.
The book that every student read was boring.
John believes that every student passed.
Every professor thinks that some student cheated.
